rules: move {dir}: Updates pos. Fails if result x < 0 or y < 0, or if target is 'Wall', or if target is occupied by an enemy with hp > 0.

attack {target}: Valid if distance == 1 and target is alive. Simultaneously: enemy takes hero.atk; hero receives enemy.atk. Hero damage is subtracted from mana first, then hp. If mana goes from > 0 to <= 0, trigger Anomaly.
ranged_attack {target}: Valid if distance is 2 or 3 and target is alive. Enemy takes hero.atk damage. No mana/hp cost to hero.
Anomaly: All enemies with distance == 1 take anomaly_dmg. If hero is on 'Conductive' tile, damage is anomaly_dmg * 2.
Defeat: Hero hp <= 0. (Defeat takes precedence over Victory if both occur in the same action).
Turn Progression: Each action in action_list increments turn by 1 regardless of success/failure.
